pr.title: Non-record: Stable Growing Recurrence, Progressive Depth + Error Feedback

output.summary: Progressively grow recurrence passes while using learnable residual scaling, error-feedback, and Jacobian-proxy regularization to stabilize depth reuse.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal TTT trains on already-scored validation chunks between sliding-window evaluations.
techniques: Progressive pass schedule (1→2→3) late in training
Residual-scale + rank-2 error feedback stabilizes recurrence
Jacobian-proxy loss keeps multi-pass dynamics contractive
